tasks.notes: LEARNING TASK. Jinay to provide: (1) sample edited image as reference, (2) step-by-step editing checklist, (3) raw images folder location. Samruddhi to practice on 1-2 images first, get feedback, then do the batch.

tasks.text: Learn ComfyUI basic workflow — generate 3 test images
tasks.notes: TRAINING. Learn the Totsburg image generation pipeline. Steps: (1) Watch Jinay demo once, (2) Try generating 3 images with guidance, (3) Compare outputs to reference. Goal: understand prompts, parameters, and output quality.

tasks.text: Proofit — Edit 1 social media post with provided content
tasks.notes: Jinay to provide: (1) Proofit brand colors/fonts, (2) content/copy for the post, (3) reference style from competitor or previous post. Samruddhi to create 2 versions, Jinay picks one. LEARNING: understand brand consistency.

tasks.text: Proofit — Edit 1 reel (simple cuts + text overlay)
tasks.notes: TRAINING. Jinay to provide: (1) raw video clips, (2) script/text overlay content, (3) reference reel style. Use CapCut or similar. Simple cuts + text + brand colors. Goal: learn basic video editing workflow.

tasks.text: Create SOP: Document Totsburg editing workflow step-by-step
tasks.notes: Once S001 is mastered, write down the exact steps: file locations, tools used, settings, checkpoints, quality checks. This becomes the repeatable SOP so Samruddhi (or future hires) can do it without Jinay.

tasks.text: Notch India — Create 1 Instagram post with full guidance
tasks.notes: Jinay to provide: (1) brand guidelines (white architectural, quiet luxury), (2) product images, (3) caption/copy, (4) reference post. Samruddhi creates 2 options. Review and iterate. LEARNING: understand premium brand aesthetics.

employee.name: Samruddhi
employee.role: AI Visual Creative & Social Media Executive
employee.background: No prior experience — learning on the job
employee.autonomy_goal: Independent visual creation for all clients without Jinay's involvement
